claim: YOLO demand evidence schema, prompts, readiness contract, and tests all distinguish project, external, user, and unknown evidence scopes with concrete validation logic.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES set explicitly declares four scopes: project, external, user, unknown
evidence.why: Core evidence scope taxonomy is defined at router entry point.

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_RESULT_SCHEMA_DEFINITION documents scope field requirement: 'scope is project | external | user | unknown; project facts require project-scoped evidence'
evidence.why: Schema contract explicitly states the four-scope model and project evidence requirements.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() function classifies evidence by scope using path, url, source, and explicit scope declarations with fallback logic
evidence.why: Implementation shows how scope classification works with multiple heuristics and explicit scope field as primary signal.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordHasProjectLocator() validates project evidence has concrete repo-relative path and rejects URLs
evidence.why: Project scope requires concrete file locator; URLs are explicitly rejected even if marked project.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeSummary() analyzes evidence records and returns scope breakdown with has_project, has_external, has_unknown flags
evidence.why: Scope analysis powers validation logic that detects scope mismatches.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues() generates EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blockers when evidence records lack valid scope
evidence.why: Validation enforces explicit scope declaration; missing scope becomes a blocker.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() implements two validators: (1) external-only evidence cannot satisfy project facts, (2) project evidence requires concrete path locator
evidence.why: Core readiness logic blocks external evidence from being treated as project facts.

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS defines explorer, cross-checker, verifier roles with writes_code: false and result_schema: yolo.demand.evidence_result.v1
evidence.why: Agent protocols specify the four-role model and schema contract for evidence results.

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot() and diffBoundarySnapshots() detect project file mutations with git-backed and fallback file walking
evidence.why: Boundary enforcement prevents agents from modifying target project files during evidence gathering.

evidence.summary: buildDemandEvidenceAgentPrompt() constructs agent prompt with explicit hard rules: 'Every evidence record must include scope: project, external, user, or unknown' and 'Project facts require project-scoped evidence from code, tests, docs, config, logs, or artifacts, with a repo-relative path or file locator'
evidence.why: Agent prompt instructs evidence agents to distinguish scope and provide project locators.

evidence.summary: Agent prompt line: '- External research tools may be available; mark external records as scope=external and do not use them as project facts'
evidence.why: Prompt explicitly tells agents to keep external research separate from project facts.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeErrors() validates each evidence record has valid scope and returns error array if missing or invalid
evidence.why: Runtime validation catches agents returning evidence without declared scope.

evidence.summary: demandRequestsExternalResearch() detects when demand text explicitly requests external research and externalEvidencePresent() checks agent results include scope=external records
evidence.why: System validates external research requests result in external-scoped evidence.

evidence.summary: Test 'external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing project facts' validates EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED blocker when only external evidence provided for project facts
evidence.why: Test confirms readiness contract blocks external-only evidence for existing-project claims.

evidence.summary: Test 'project evidence requires a concrete project locator' validates PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blocker when scope=project but no path provided
evidence.why: Test confirms project scope without concrete path is blocked.

evidence.summary: Test 'external URLs cannot be relabeled as project evidence' validates PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blocker when url field present despite scope=project
evidence.why: Test confirms URLs are rejected even if explicitly labeled project scope.

evidence.summary: Test 'evidence records must declare valid scope explicitly' validates EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker when evidence record lacks scope field
evidence.why: Test confirms scope declaration is mandatory for all evidence records.

evidence.summary: Test 'cross-check PRD readiness requires every evidence agent result' validates explorer, cross-checker, verifier all required with completed status for cross_check policy
evidence.why: Test confirms the three-agent protocol is enforced by readiness contract.

evidence.summary: Test 'external research request requires external-scoped evidence' validates EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED blocker when demand text includes URL or external research but agents return no scope=external records
evidence.why: Test confirms external research requests must produce external-scoped evidence.

evidence.summary: Test 'boundary blocks project file mutation even when agent results pass' validates BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blocker when agent writes project file outside allowed artifact root
evidence.why: Test confirms boundary snapshot detects and blocks unauthorized mutations.

evidence.summary: Test 'agent evidence without explicit scope is blocked during normalization' validates EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker when agent returns evidence without scope field
evidence.why: Test confirms dispatch runtime normalizes missing scope to blocker.

evidence.summary: Test 'agent prompt tells providers to return JSON without writing result artifacts' validates prompt includes scope instructions and boundary rules
evidence.why: Test confirms agent prompt communicates scope requirements to providers.

risks: If evidence scope validation logic has bugs, agents could return invalid evidence that passes validation
If boundary snapshot fails (git not available, file system race), project mutations could go undetected
If agent providers ignore prompt instructions, they could treat external research as project facts

result.notes: Evidence system has comprehensive scope discrimination across schema, router, dispatch, and tests. Four scopes (project, external, user, unknown) are enforced at multiple validation layers: schema definition, scope classification, project locator validation, boundary mutation detection, and readiness contract blockers.
